docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF YIBING HUANG IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY VIVIEN CHOY, CANTONESE INTERPRETER, WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRTERS OATH. DEFENDANT RAFAEL SERRANO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, YIBING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERRANO, RAFAEL $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
